_note: Seed EPISODES for the episodic retrieval eval — deterministic, no model. Each is a past 'session episode' (what a session did). mem-proxy.py loads these into a temp mem-rank store and runs kind_filter=episode retrieval for each golden question. Keep small (episodic goldens hard-capped at 30 too).

episodes.did: wired episodic + vector retrieval + temporal into llmwiki memory layer
